About OEEO 
What to know 
The Office of Equal Employment Opportunity (OEEO) is closed as part of HHS’s Reduction in Force, in accordance with President Donald Trump’s Executive Order 14210, dated February 11, 2025, and the Department of Health and Human Services&rsq
